title: Identify the active UV set without discarding alternatives
question: Which preserved UV stream best explains a selected material region under controlled texture tests?
hypothesis: One preserved UV stream will produce materially better texture continuity while the remaining streams retain distinct non-colour semantics.
assumptions: All available UV streams have been copied without remapping.
The test texture and material assignment are known and fixed.
procedure: Import every preserved UV stream under a stable semantic name.
Apply the same numbered test texture to each UV stream in isolation.
Capture seam continuity, orientation, density, and out-of-range diagnostics.
Retain all streams regardless of the selected material-facing result.
acceptance_criteria: The selected UV stream explains the target material region without destructive remapping.
Alternative streams remain available and documented.
failure_criteria: No preserved stream produces coherent mapping.
The result depends on an undocumented transform or manually repaired topology.
